* ChatTab 라우팅 연결 확인

ai-role: implementation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix AI badge display: change ai_categorization column from text to jsonb

The ai_categorization column was stored as text, but the frontend expects
a parsed JSON object for badge rendering. PostgREST returns text columns
as strings, so properties like .category, .is_urgent were always undefined.
Changed to jsonb so PostgREST returns parsed objects. Updated TS types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix large-bar overlap: zone clipping, glow ring bounds, controls layout

- Add per-zone QPainter setClipRect() in paintEvent() — prevents any
  zone's content from bleeding into adjacent zones at large sizes
- Fix glow ring overflow: at size3 (h=128), ring_r reached 62px while
  dx was only rz.x()+31, painting 31px off the left widget edge;
  clamp dx to ensure rings stay within widget bounds
- Fix controls zone overlap: bw_ was unbounded (h//2 = 64 at size3),
  causing gear/close buttons to encroach on OBS label at 1920px;
  cap bw_ at zone_width//4 and compute label_right as fixed margin
  from button area so OBS label always has clear space
- At size3, disk warning now stacks vertically below OBS label

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(mobile): verify BUG-001 mic release via removePublishedTrack — field tested

Three fix iterations for Android mic release on mute:
1. setAndroidAudioConfiguration(media) — insufficient (AudioRecord still held)
2. ADM stopLocalRecording() — insufficient (PeerConnection overrides)
3. removePublishedTrack() — works (removes RtpSender, triggers SDP renegotiation)

Remove unused dart:io and flutter_webrtc imports. Close task 005.

- Add a11y: role=radiogroup, aria-checked, type=button on category toggle

pinch-grab numbers and place them in answer cells, with manual
carry/borrow mechanics.

fix: drop REFERENCES clause from ALTER TABLE migration

SQLite's ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN doesn't reliably support REFERENCES.
The FK is defined in the CREATE TABLE DDL for new deployments.

fix(docstore): SSE 진행률을 시뮬레이션 타이머 방식으로 전환

--- debug-note ---
when:
* 업로드/법령임포트/AI분석 시 SSE 실시간 진행률 표시 기능 사용 시

symptom:
* Vercel 서버리스 환경에서 SSE 이벤트가 전혀 전달되지 않음

context:
* Vercel serverless는 res.write() 호출을 버퍼링하여 res.end() 시점에 일괄 전송

root-cause:
* Vercel 서버리스 함수는 true SSE 스트리밍을 지원하지 않음

fix:
* 백엔드 API 3개(upload, law-import, documents)를 표준 JSON 응답으로 복원
* 프론트엔드에 useSimulatedProgress 커스텀 훅 도입하여 타이머 기반 진행률 애니메이션 구현
* 미사용 SSE 관련 state 변수 및 lib/sse.js 모듈 제거

verify:
* 업로드/법령임포트/AI분석 진행률 UI가 analyzeProgress2/uploadProgress/lawImportProgress 훅을 정상 참조
* SSE 관련 코드 잔존 없음 확인 (grep authFetchSSE/initSSE → 0건)

prevent:
* Vercel 서버리스에서는 SSE 대신 폴링 또는 프론트엔드 시뮬레이션 방식 사용
--- /debug-note ---

  reads "42%[1]" not "42[1]%".
- Add tsconfig path alias for @wiki-server/kb-verifications-route.
- Add 7 tests for the KB verifications API endpoints.
- Extract barColors constant to module scope (was recreated in render loop).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add End-Persistent signal and persistent session cleanup to HttpServer

Add support for explicit persistent session termination via the
"Qorus-Connection: End-Persistent" header in both HTTP/1.x and HTTP/2
persistent handler loops. On HTTP/2, disconnect() doesn't close the TCP
connection (multiplexed), so the server's persistent handler loop never
gets a close signal - the End-Persistent mechanism allows clients to
explicitly terminate persistent sessions.

Changes:
- handleMultiplexedPersistentSync: accept deregister_fn and sock_key
  params; handle End-Persistent signal; deregister persistent queue
  before returning to prevent race conditions; keep persistent handlers
  alive on idle timeout (only exit for non-persistent handlers)
- handlePersistentSync (HTTP/1.x): handle End-Persistent signal
- handleRequest catch block: clean up leaked persistent state when
  handler became persistent during a failed request but phi.handler
  was never set
- Add drainOrphanedPersistentRequests() to process requests pushed to
  the persistent queue during the race window between the last pq.get()
  and deregistration

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(mobile): release native AudioRecord on mute via ADM stopLocalRecording (BUG-001)

The previous fix (setAndroidAudioConfiguration) only changed the AudioManager
mode but didn't release the native AudioRecord inside JavaAudioDeviceModule.
The AudioRecord persists for the PeerConnection lifetime regardless of track
state, blocking Android's speech recognizer from accessing the mic.

Fix: call flutter_webrtc NativeAudioManagement.stopLocalRecording() on mute
(which calls audioDeviceModule.requestStopRecording() natively) to actually
release the AudioRecord. On unmute, startLocalRecording() prewarms the ADM
before restarting the track.
